title: Multi-omics biomarker discovery in an endocrine disease

findings.executive_summary: Integration of plasma proteomics and metabolomics to identify a multi-omics biomarker signature for an endocrine disease. Sparse feature selection and classification.

embedding.source_text: Multi-omics biomarker discovery in an endocrine disease | Integration of plasma proteomics and metabolomics to identify a multi-omics biomarker signature for an endocrine disease. Sparse feature selection and classification. | Methods: multi-omics integration, classification, feature selection | Data: proteomics, metabolomics | Disease: type 2 diabetes, endocrine disease | Tools: mixOmics, DIABLO, caret
